name: Recurrent Core + Learned Feedback + Full-Rollout QAT
blurb: Shared recurrent core (stem/core/tail partitioning) with STE fake-quantized core weights, low-rank error-feedback correction, and recurrence-safe TTT. Built on the LeakyReLU² + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon record (1.1194 BPB). Three script variants: QAT-only baseline, fixed feedback, learned feedback.
author: nesta.midavaine
